title: チームのハッピーエンド

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a break from team training, I spot Rice
Shower looking a little upset.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Everyone was talking about sad things, and listening to them made me sad too... Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the team was chatting during their
break and ended up airing grievances about
things that happened to them recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like the others had a lot of fun sharing
their stories, but hearing about their misfortunes
has really gotten Rice Shower down.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
One of them accidentally stepped in a ditch while
taking a walk...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Someone else had a dream where they were being
chased by a monster...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And another person accidentally used sugar
instead of salt when they were cooking!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The more I listened to their stories, the sadder I
got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, I can't blame her. We all experience
emotions differently, and Rice Shower is just more
sensitive to these kinds of things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks genuinely upset, so I want to help cheer
her up.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we think of what happened next in
each situation?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list:
For example, after the person walked into a
ditch...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yes?
choice_data_list:
She was able to find a missing item she'd lost in
there!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I see... So we continue the stories, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The one who was being chased by the monster
ended up befriending it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the Umamusume who put sugar in her
cooking realized it was tastier that way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I throw more ideas at her, Rice Shower starts
to cheer up.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness... I'm glad they all had happy
endings.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower's mood improves, and she returns to
training with a big smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her so happy seems to cheer up
<chrname> too, and she looks more
relaxed as well.
